options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all or specified options to default value

options.name: -accumulated_small_attacker_factor
options.description: <double> Specifies the multiplication factor that controls the effect of the cap mode accumulated small attacker.

options.name: -accumulated_small_attacker_mode
options.description: {cap|current|zero_mean|numerical} Specifies the multiplication factor that controls the effect of the cap mode accumulated small attacker.

options.name: -accumulated_small_attacker_threshold
options.description: <double> Specifies whether to use the current-matching based method for accumulated small attackers.

options.name: -attacker_alignment
options.description: {path|path_overlap|timing_aware_edge|input_arrival} Specifies the attacker alignment.

options.name: -clock_delta_delay_threshold
options.description: Specifies the value above which the clock delta delay should be calculated.

options.name: -clocks
options.description: Specifies the value above which the clock delta delay should be calculated.

options.name: -constrained_input_threshold_failure_point
options.description: {input|both}

options.name: -delta_delay_annotation_mode
options.description: {lumpedOnNet|arc} Calculates the delay for each arc (cell arc and net arc) in a path.

options.name: -delta_delay_threshold
options.description: delta delay analysis threshold

options.name: -double_switching
options.description: {none|clock|data_sequential|all} Specifies type for which double switching analysis will happen

options.name: -enable_bus_attacker_correlation
options.description: {true|false}

options.name: -enable_delay_report
options.description: Enables SI delay reports.

options.name: -enable_double_clocking_check
options.description: {true|false} Enables double clocking check in AAE.

options.name: -enable_drv_with_delta_slew
options.description: {true|false} Enables SI slews reporting.

options.name: -enable_dynamic_receiver_peak_limits
options.description: {true|false}

options.name: -enable_glitch_propagation
options.description: Enables glitch propagation and driver weakening through single stage cells.

options.name: -enable_glitch_propagation_spice_deck
options.description: {true|false} Enables glitch propagation in spice deck.

options.name: -enable_glitch_report
options.description: Enables AAE SI glitch analysis.

options.name: -enable_logical_correlation
options.description: {true|false} Enables the AAE-SI logical correlation.

options.name: -enable_logical_correlation_for_bus
options.description: {true|false}

options.name: -enable_overshoot_undershoot_glitch
options.description: {true|false} Enables overshoot/undershoot analysis and reporting.

options.name: -enable_two_stage_driver_weakening
options.description: {true|false}

options.name: -enable_user_defined_bus_merging
options.description: {true|false} Enables bus merging feature - if a net is in two groups, then the groups are merged

options.name: -enable_virtual_attacker_constituent_report
options.description: {true|false}

options.name: -glitch_accuracy_level
options.description: Specifies the accuracy levels for glitch analysis

options.name: -glitch_analysis_type
options.description: {source|full_propagation}

options.name: -hold_slack
options.description: Specifies the slack reselection threshold for hold.

options.name: -individual_attacker_clock_threshold
options.description: <double> Sets the glitch tolerance for individual attacker nets on victim clock nets.

options.name: -individual_attacker_simulation_filtering
options.description: {true|false} Enables electrical filtering based on attackers' simulated glitch peaks.

options.name: -individual_attacker_threshold
options.description: AAE virtual attacker threshold

options.name: -input_glitch_full_propagation_threshold
options.description: <double>

options.name: -input_glitch_full_propagation_vh_threshold
options.description: <double>

options.name: -input_glitch_full_propagation_vl_threshold
options.description: <double>

options.name: -input_glitch_threshold
options.description: Specifies the input glitch failure threshold value during AAE analysis.

options.name: -input_glitch_vh_threshold
options.description: Specifies the input glitch vh failure threshold value during AAE analysis.

options.name: -input_glitch_vl_threshold
options.description: Specifies the input glitch vl failure threshold value during AAE analysis.

options.name: -max_bus_attacker_count
options.description: Max number of bus attacker per victim net

options.name: -nonlinear_attacker_slew
options.description: Uses a non-linear attacker. If set to false , it uses a linear attacker.

options.name: -num_si_iteration
options.description: Specifies the maximum number of timing window iterations that should be performed during SI delay analysis.

options.name: -pessimistic_mode
options.description: {advanced|advanced_node|reduced_pessimism|increased_pessimism|high_pessimism} Pessimistic Mode Settings

options.name: -receiver_clk_peak_limit
options.description: Defines the glitch check limit for clock inputs in receiver peak mode. This parameter is specified as a ratio of vdd.

options.name: -receiver_latch_peak_limit
options.description: Defines the glitch check limit for latch inputs in receiver peak mode. This parameter is specified as a ratio of vdd.

options.name: -receiver_peak_limit
options.description: Defines the receiver peak/glitch peak limit at all nodes. The value specified for this parameter is a ratio of vdd.

options.name: -report_max_virtual_attacker_constituents
options.description: <int>

options.name: -report_si_slew_max_transition
options.description: {true|false} report sislew violations

options.name: -secondary_attacker_decoupling_factor
options.description: <double> Specifies decoupling factor for secondary aggressors.

options.name: -separate_delta_delay_on_data
options.description: {true|false} Separates the delta delay on data (delta delay is always separated for clock).

options.name: -setup_slack
options.description: Specifies the slack reselection threshold for setup.

options.name: -si_reselection
options.description: {delta_delay|slack|xcap_ratio} Specifies the SI reselection criteria during timing window iterations.

options.name: -si_reselection_delay_threshold
options.description: <double> Allows to change the delay reselection criteria.

options.name: -skip_noise_model_check
options.description: Specifies a list of pins for which noise model check will not take place.

options.name: -skip_tw
options.description: Specifies the list of nets for which timing window is to be skipped.

options.name: -switch_prob
options.description: Sets the attacker switching probability.

options.name: -unconstrained_net_use_inf_tw
options.description: {true|false} Specifies that unconstrained nets will have an infinite timing window.

options.name: -view_specific_settings
options.description: <view:setting:value> Spicifies a global variable value or macro settings for particular view using {viewName:eng_global|macro:value}
